meaning: SEC(Scurities and Exchange Commission)证券交易委员会,秘书(secretary)n. 书记,大臣,秒
examples: She ran a personal best of 13.01 sec.
Davis won the 400 metre hurdles in a new Olympic time of 49.3 sec.
The first woman to finish was Grete Waitz of Norway, with a time of 2 hrs, 29 min., 30 sec.
What is the SEC supposed to be doing while all of this is going on?
Critics say the SEC has been dragging its feet on tighter rules on short-selling.
